title: Binary Subarrays With Sum
hints: Since the array contains only 0s and 1s, the sum of any subarray is simply its count of 1s. How can you track these counts efficiently?
Compute prefix sums of the array. The sum of a subarray from i to j is the difference between two prefix sums.
Use a hash map to store frequencies of prefix sums encountered so far. For each current prefix sum, check how many previous sums satisfy the difference condition.
